programs.title: Pawn Stars
programs.desc: Rick evaluates Eddie Van Halen sneakers and a rigged roulette wheel, while Corey examines a sterling silver mint julep cup and Chum inspects a Louis Vuitton jacket.

programs.title: Storage Wars
programs.desc: Brandi is fired up about expanding her brand in San Bernardino. Later, Rene is positive that everyone is out to get him and Dusty tackles a locker dustier than him.

programs.title: Storage Wars
programs.desc: Lisa and Kenny are forced to break out the parasols in the scorching heat in Riverside, while Duty wears intuition on his sleeve.

programs.title: Storage Wars
programs.desc: Ivy and his son discover a locker containing mysterious sports gear. Meanwhile, Rene's assertiveness leads to a satisfying victory, refusing to be exploited.

programs.desc: At Clay Spencer Blacksmith shop, three skilled smiths face off in a heated competition. Subsequently, through gruelling challenges, they showcase their mastery of the forge.
